content.problemStatement:
Ada is training for her match against Magnus Carlsen in the World Chess Championship 2020.

Ada took a standard chessboard with 888 rows (numbered 111 through 888) and 888 columns (numbered 111 through 888); let's denote a cell in row rrr and column ccc by (r,c)(r, c)(r,c). Then, Ada placed a bishop in a cell (r0,c0)(r_0, c_0)(r0‚Äč,c0‚Äč); it is guaranteed that this cell is black. Ada's goal is to move the bishop in such a way that it visits all black cells.

Remember that a bishop is a piece that moves diagonally ‚Äē formally, the bishop may move from a cell (rs,cs)(r_s, c_s)(rs‚Äč,cs‚Äč) to a cell (rt,ct)(r_t, c_t)(rt‚Äč,ct‚Äč) if and only if either rs+cs=rt+ctr_s+c_s=r_t+c_trs‚Äč+cs‚Äč=rt‚Äč+ct‚Äč or rs‚ąícs=rt‚ąíctr_s-c_s=r_t-c_trs‚Äč‚ąícs‚Äč=rt‚Äč‚ąíct‚Äč. In such a move, the bishop visits all cells between (rs,cs)(r_s, c_s)(rs‚Äč,cs‚Äč) and (rt,ct)(r_t, c_t)(rt‚Äč,ct‚Äč) on this diagonal (inclusive).

Help Ada find a sequence of at most 646464 moves for the bishop such that when the bishop follows this route, it visits all black cells on the chessboard. Note that each cell may be visited multiple times and it is not necessary to return to the starting point.
constraints: (r0,c0)(r_0, c_0)(r0‚Äč,c0‚Äč) is a black cell, i.e. r0+c0r_0+c_0r0‚Äč+c0‚Äč is even
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains two space-separated integers r0r_0r0‚Äč and c0c_0c0‚Äč.
content.outputFormat:
For each test case:


First, print a line containing a single integer MMM (M‚Č§64M \le 64M‚Č§64) ‚Äē the number of moves in the bishop's route.
Then, print MMM lines. For each iii (1‚Č§i‚Č§M1 \le i \le M1‚Č§i‚Č§M), the iii-th of these lines should contain two space-separated integers rir_iri‚Äč and cic_ici‚Äč, where the route followed by the bishop is (r0,c0)‚Üí(r1,c1)‚Üí(r2,c2)‚Üí‚Ä¶‚Üí(rM,cM)(r_0,c_0) \rightarrow (r_1,c_1) \rightarrow (r_2,c_2) \rightarrow \ldots \rightarrow (r_M,c_M)(r0‚Äč,c0‚Äč)‚Üí(r1‚Äč,c1‚Äč)‚Üí(r2‚Äč,c2‚Äč)‚Üí‚Ä¶‚Üí(rM‚Äč,cM‚Äč).
